name: Light Office / SMB General
notes: Email, browsing, light SaaS. Minimal video.

name: Standard Office
notes: Typical knowledge work with periodic video calls and cloud apps.

name: Heavy SaaS / Video Conferencing
notes: All-day video meetings, large cloud-based file workflows.

name: Healthcare (with imaging)
notes: PACS, EHR, imaging transfers. Strong SSL inspection load.

name: Education K-12
notes: 1:1 devices, streaming video for classrooms, testing windows.

name: Higher Education
notes: Mixed research, residential, and BYOD. Session counts run high.

name: Manufacturing / OT
notes: Many low-bandwidth IoT/OT devices. Session count usually dominates.

name: Hospitality (with guest WiFi)
notes: Guest streaming-heavy traffic, captive portal, PCI scope.

name: Retail (multi-site)
notes: POS, inventory, small staff networks at many sites. SD-WAN territory.

name: Financial Services
notes: Trading, market data, strict logging and inspection requirements.
